live_matches.event_name: UFC Fight Night - Della Maddalena vs Prates
live_matches.match_title: UFC Fight Night - Della Maddalena vs Prates - 2 May 2026
live_matches.description: Jack Della Maddalena vs Carlos Prates sets up as a thrilling welterweight showdown between Della Maddalena’s sharp boxing and composure and Prates’ explosive striking power and finishing ability. Tune in to catch all the action from UFC Fight Night, LIVE on Sony LIV.
